message: lifecycle.ProvisionResult was removed (Wave 3). This will not compile.
fix: Use lifecycle.LogProvision; multi-log orchestration is now a domain concern

message: lifecycle.ProvisionConfig was removed (Wave 3). This will not compile.
fix: Use lifecycle.SingleLogConfig; multi-log orchestration is now a domain concern

message: lifecycle.ProvisionThreeLogs was removed (Wave 3). This will not compile.
fix: Call lifecycle.ProvisionSingleLog 3x and compose the results in domain code

message: Access to .DomainPayload in a function that also calls builder APIs — possible SDK-D6 violation (builder must not read Domain Payload).
fix: Move the DomainPayload read into verifier/domain code. Builder paths must rely on Control Header fields only.
